text: TRUMP 'REGIME CHANGE ACHIEVED' + TAKE THE OIL: Trump (FT interview published March 30): 'We've had regime change — they're all dead'; simultaneously posts on Truth Social he's in 'serious discussions with A NEW, MORE REASONABLE REGIME'; threatens to seize Kharg Island (90% of Iran's oil exports) and 'obliterate' Iran's power plants/oil wells; Iran denies any US deal accepted — Araghchi: 'unreasonable demands'

sources.name: Time Magazine — Trump Seems to Embrace 'Regime Change' in Iran
Al Jazeera — Trump wants to invade Iran to seize oil, calls US objectors 'stupid people'

text: SPAIN BANS US MILITARY FLIGHTS — TRUMP THREATENS TRADE WAR WITH NATO ALLY: Spain formally closes airspace to all US planes in Iran war — first NATO ally to do so; Defense Min. Robles: 'Neither bases nor Spanish airspace authorised for any Iran war actions'; US already relocated 15 aircraft from Rota/Morón; Trump: 'told Scott [Bessent] to cut off all dealings with Spain — they're terrible'; HRW confirms Iran used cluster munitions on Israel; gas at $3.98/gal (+$1 in 31 days)

sources.name: Euronews — Spain closes its airspace to all US aircraft involved in Iran war
Times of Israel — Trump threatens to cut all trade ties with Spain over Iran war refusal

text: HRW: IRAN CLUSTER MUNITIONS 'MAY AMOUNT TO WAR CRIMES' + 3 UNIFIL PEACEKEEPERS KILLED: HRW confirms Iran fired cluster-munition ballistic missiles at Israel 3+ times since Feb 28 — 4 Israeli civilians killed; France calls emergency UN Security Council session after 3 UNIFIL peacekeepers killed in two separate incidents in southern Lebanon (1 Indonesian at Adchit Al-Qusayr + 2 in vehicle near Bani Hayyan); Guterres: 'may amount to war crimes'; deadliest single day for UN peacekeepers

text: RUBIO: HORMUZ 'WILL REOPEN ONE WAY OR ANOTHER' + IDF SGT. BEN ZION KILLED: Rubio tells Al Jazeera US will force Hormuz open if Iran doesn't agree; describes 'fractures in Islamic Republic,' people inside Iran now 'talking to us in ways previous leaders never did'; IDF Sgt. Liran Ben Zion (19, Holon) killed by Hezbollah anti-tank missile in south Lebanon — 7th IDF soldier killed in Lebanon; Israel shifts to economic targets in Iran, IDF 'days from completing all priority targets'

text: DAY 31 PM: US SPECIAL OPS DEPLOYED + OIL SETTLES $112.78 + USS TRIPOLI ARRIVES: Hundreds of Army Rangers and Navy SEALs arrived in Middle East — no mission yet assigned; USS Tripoli (3,500 Marines, F-35Bs) confirmed operational in region; US troops now exceed 57,000 in theater (largest buildup since 2003); Brent crude settles at $112.78/bbl (+41.3% from pre-war); AAA gas $3.99/gal nationally; Iran threatens residences of US/Israeli officials as 'legitimate targets'

text: IRGC COMMANDER HASSANZADEH ELIMINATED + GENERAL ZAKARIAEI DEAD: Israeli strike kills IRGC Rasul-Allah Corps Commander Hassan Hassanzadeh in Tehran — reportedly via AI-targeting platform; IRGC Gen. Majid Zakariaei (Natural Resources Protection Forces) dies overnight from March 28 strike wounds; confirmed by ISNA; 82nd Airborne troops physically arrive in Middle East — US troops exceed 57,000 (largest buildup since 2003)

text: NATO INTERCEPTS 4TH IRANIAN MISSILE OVER TURKEY + SAUDI INTERCEPTS 5: NATO shoots down 4th Iranian ballistic missile in Turkish airspace — Iran denies; Saudi Arabia intercepts 5 missiles targeting Eastern Province oil infrastructure; Abu Dhabi 6 injured by intercepted missile debris; Kuwait military camp hit — 10 soldiers wounded; Israeli strike kills Lebanese soldier Ali Ajam at permanent LAF checkpoint (first direct hit on LAF installation)

sources.name: Bloomberg — NATO Intercepts Fourth Iranian Missile

text: KNESSET $45.8B DEFENSE BUDGET + IMF 'ALL ROADS LEAD TO HIGHER PRICES': Israel Knesset approves record $45.8B defense budget (62-55) — prevents snap elections Netanyahu would lose; IMF March 30: Iran war causing 'largest oil disruption in history'; OECD: US inflation forecast raised to 4.2%; Goldman Sachs: 30% US recession probability; Bank of Israel holds rates at 4% citing war inflation

text: IRANIAN DRONE STRIKES KUWAITI TANKER AT DUBAI PORT: IRGC drone hits fully laden Kuwaiti VLCC 'Al-Salmi' at anchor in Dubai port area just after midnight — fire breaks out, 24 crew safely evacuated, oil spill risk; IRGC claims ship carried Israeli-linked flag; Chinese-flagged vessels transit Hormuz unopposed — selective blockade continues; Brent crude expected to spike on tanker attack
